data.body:
## Description
Create tests/skills/test_completion_verifier_agent.py that validates the completion-verifier agent definition.

Tests must verify:
- Agent file exists at plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md
- YAML frontmatter contains name: completion-verifier, model: sonnet
- Body contains SC/DD verification logic (checks success criteria for epics, done definitions for stories)
- Body contains consumer smoke test instructions (enumerate consumers, define verification commands)
- Body contains remediation task creation instructions (create bug tasks on failure)
- Body explicitly excludes test pass/fail, code quality, lint/formatting from scope
- Body contains the framing: 'did we build what the spec says' not 'is the code correct'

Test approach: Parse markdown agent file, verify structural content requirements.
Tests must FAIL (RED) since agent file does not yet exist.

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test_completion_verifier_agent.py — Create

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test_completion_verifier_agent.py
- [ ] Tests contain at least 5 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'def test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test_completion_verifier_agent.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] Tests fail (RED)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && poetry run pytest tests/skills/test_completion_verifier_agent.py --tb=no -q 2>&1 | grep -q 'failed'

**Escalation policy**: Escalate to the user whenever you do not have high confidence.
